steps.title: Identify the abnormal result
steps.content: Belgium has stronger democratic institutions but a higher inflation rate than Equatorial Guinea. The research says stronger democratic institutions tend to restrain inflation, so Belgium's result differs from the expected pattern.

steps.title: Choose the anomaly word
steps.content: A overstates the case by calling the result impossible to explain. B means unsupported, and C means joking. The word for a result that deviates from the expected pattern fits the sentence. The answer is D.
